content.speakerText: You’re here every morning? Same order?
content.speakerTextCn: 你每天都来？点的也是同一杯？

options.text: I just started coming here last week.
Pretty much—I’m a creature of habit!
I don’t drink coffee at all.
I usually go to the park instead.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Pretty much—I’m a creature of habit!' 体现了用习惯性行为建立熟悉感，符合场景‘确认兴趣’的核心目的。其他选项要么否认习惯（如'I don’t drink coffee'），要么回避话题（如'I go to the park'），无法延续对话的共鸣感。

content.speakerText: You got that hoodie from the same shop downtown?
content.speakerTextCn: 你这件卫衣也是 downtown 那家店买的？

options.text: I didn’t even notice the tag!
Yes! I’ve got three from them—best quality ever.
I prefer online shopping for everything.
I don’t really care about brands.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Yes! I’ve got three from them—best quality ever.' 通过具体细节（买了三件、质量好）强化共同兴趣，符合场景目标。选项1回避问题，选项3和4虽真实但未建立连接，缺乏共鸣。

content.speakerText: I’ve been hiking every weekend this month. You into that?
content.speakerTextCn: 这个月我每个周末都去徒步。你也喜欢吗？

options.text: Actually, I’ve been to three trails this month too—Love the views!
I’m more of a movie person.

content.explanation: 正确答案通过分享具体细节（去过三条步道、喜欢风景）积极回应并确认共同兴趣，是典型‘确认兴趣’策略。其他选项要么否定兴趣，要么转移话题，无法建立情感连接。

content.template: I’m a ______ of habit—I come here every morning.
content.hint: 这是表达‘有规律’的地道短语，常用于确认生活习惯

content.template: Yes! I’ve got ______ from them—best quality ever.
content.hint: 用具体数字增强可信度和共鸣，展示兴趣深度
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频词汇（用具体数量表达兴趣一致性）

content.template: I’ve been reading ______ books lately—have you tried any?
content.hint: 填入一种具体兴趣类型，如小说、音乐、运动等，让对话有共鸣点
content.knowledgePoint: 场景核心句型（用具体兴趣名词确认共同点）

content.speakerText: You’re here every morning? Same order?
content.speakerTextCn: 你每天都来？点的也是同一杯？
expectedAnswers: Pretty much—I’m a creature of habit!
Yeah, I always get the oat milk latte with cinnamon. It’s my ritual.
I come here every day without fail—coffee is my morning anchor.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了对方关于习惯的提问并建立共鸣
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确，是否使用了场景关键词如 'creature of habit' 或 'ritual'
表达自然度：是否像母语者一样自然流畅，避免生硬翻译
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个与习惯或偏好相关的具体细节

content.speakerText: You got that hoodie from the same shop downtown?
content.speakerTextCn: 你这件卫衣也是 downtown 那家店买的？
expectedAnswers: Yes! I’ve got three from them—best quality ever.
Actually, I bought two of them last year and just got a third. Their fit is perfect.
I’m obsessed with that store—I’ve worn their hoodies for years.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否确认了共同兴趣并延伸细节
语言准确性：是否正确使用了 'got from', 'best quality', 'obsessed with' 等表达
表达自然度：是否避免了机械重复，加入了个人情感或经历
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个关于购买数量、品牌忠诚度或质量评价的细节

content.speakerText: I’ve been listening to jazz every night. You into it?
content.speakerTextCn: 我每晚都听爵士乐。你喜欢吗？
expectedAnswers: Actually, I’ve been getting into jazz lately—Miles Davis is my favorite.
Yes! I’ve got a vinyl collection of 50+ jazz albums.
I used to hate it, but now I can’t sleep without it.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应并确认共同兴趣，而非简单回答'yes'或'no'
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的表达如 'getting into', 'collection', 'can't sleep without'
表达自然度：是否体现真实情感和个性化经历，而非模板化回答
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个具体兴趣对象（如音乐人、专辑、媒介）
